title: Goofy Additions
description:
This Mod adds Elements like Ores, Ingots and Armor some might call "Goofy"
(My Side Project)
body:
Goofy Additions - Minecraft Mod

Goofy Additions is a fun and lighthearted mod that brings some wacky new content to your Minecraft world!

- Steve Paintings – Decorate your base with ridiculous Steve-themed artworks!
- OIIA Ore – A brand-new mysterious ore waiting to be discovered!
- OIIA Ingot – Not only can you craft with it, but you can also EAT it! Who knew metal could be so tasty?
- OIIA Armor – Suit up in the goofy yet powerful OIIA armor set!

Embrace the chaos and add some goofy vibes to your game!

## **_LICENSE_**

  - Create Resourcepacks without my Permission that change the Textures/Models that my Mod already has
> **You are NOT Allowed to** :
  -   Upload the compiled Mod to another Platform without my Permission
  -   Use my Assets for your Own/Commercial use without my Permission
,you can obtain Permission by DM´ing me on Discord
